type tokenJWT struct {
	lg         *zap.Logger
	signMethod jwt.SigningMethod
	key        any
	ttl        time.Duration
	verifyOnly bool
}

type Clause struct {
	Name                string // WHERE
	BeforeExpression    Expression
	AfterNameExpression Expression
	AfterExpression     Expression
	Expression          Expression
	Builder             ClauseBuilder
}
